## Analyzers (1)

Enrich observables with intelligence

### [StaxxSearch v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/StaxxSearch)
Fetch observable details from an Anomali STAXX instance.

- **Author:** Robert Nixon
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`, `ip`, `url`, `hash`, `mail`
